pi_items.source: task description and export_result.sh target file variable
task description and verifier.py bounding box logic

privileged_info_summary: The task requires the agent to construct a new 3D model from a blank canvas in SolveSpace. The expected output file path is /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/square_flange_shaft.slvs. The final part is specified to have a 60x60mm base plate with a 50mm tall shaft protruding from the top, making the overall bounding box approximately 60x60x60mm. The verifier confirms at least 2 extrusion groups, at least 1 circle, a minimum of 40 triangles in the exported STL, and checks that all three dimensions of the STL bounding box are 60mm (±12mm tolerance).
